name: Barbarian
summary: A warrior of fury — armor optional, restraint definitely optional.

features.name: Rage
features.summary: Enter a battle fury as a bonus action: bonus damage, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing, advantage on STR checks and saves. Limited uses per long rest.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.summary: Without armor, AC = 10 + DEX + CON (shields allowed).

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.summary: Use the mastery property of two weapon types of your choice.

name: Bard
summary: Magic through art — inspiration for friends, humiliation for enemies.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.summary: Bonus action: give a creature a d6 to add to one d20 test within the next hour. Uses equal to CHA modifier per long rest.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.summary: Cast prepared spells from the bard list using Charisma; a musical instrument is your focus.

name: Cleric
summary: A conduit for a god's will — mace in one hand, miracles in the other.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.summary: Cast prepared spells from the cleric list using Wisdom; a holy symbol is your focus.

features.name: Divine Order
features.summary: Choose Protector (martial weapons + heavy armor) or Thaumaturge (extra cantrip, bonus to Arcana/Religion).

name: Druid
summary: The wild given a voice — and, when needed, claws.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.summary: Cast prepared spells from the druid list using Wisdom; a druidic focus channels your magic.

features.name: Druidic
features.summary: You know the secret language of druids and can leave hidden messages.

features.name: Primal Order
features.summary: Choose Magician (extra cantrip, bonus to Arcana/Nature) or Warden (martial weapons + medium armor).

name: Fighter
summary: Mastery of weapons, armor, and the simple art of still standing at the end.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.summary: Choose a Fighting Style feat, e.g. Archery, Defense, or Great Weapon Fighting.

features.name: Second Wind
features.summary: Bonus action: regain 1d10 + fighter level hit points. Limited uses, regained on rest.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.summary: Use the mastery property of three weapon types of your choice.

name: Monk
summary: The body as the weapon; discipline as the whetstone.

features.name: Martial Arts
features.summary: Unarmed strikes and monk weapons use a d6 (scaling) and DEX; bonus-action unarmed strike; grapple/shove with unarmed strikes.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.summary: Without armor or shield, AC = 10 + DEX + WIS.

name: Paladin
summary: An oath given steel: smite the wicked, shield the weak.

features.name: Lay On Hands
features.summary: A healing pool of 5 × paladin level hit points; touch to restore, or spend 5 to cure poison.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.summary: Cast prepared spells from the paladin list using Charisma; a holy symbol is your focus.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.summary: Use the mastery property of two weapon types of your choice.

name: Ranger
summary: Hunter at the wild's edge — tracker, archer, and very bad news for something.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.summary: Cast prepared spells from the ranger list using Wisdom.

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.summary: Hunter's Mark is always prepared, with free castings per long rest.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.summary: Use the mastery property of two weapon types of your choice.

name: Rogue
summary: Precision over force: the right blade, in the right back, at the right time.

features.name: Expertise
features.summary: Double proficiency bonus in two of your skills.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.summary: Once per turn, +1d6 damage (scaling) with a finesse/ranged weapon when you have advantage or an ally is adjacent to the target.

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.summary: You know the coded speech of the underworld, plus one other language.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.summary: Use the mastery property of two weapon types of your choice.

name: Sorcerer
summary: Magic in the blood, whether the blood asked for it or not.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.summary: Cast prepared spells from the sorcerer list using Charisma; an arcane focus channels your power.

features.name: Innate Sorcery
features.summary: Bonus action, 2/long rest: for 1 minute your spell save DC rises by 1 and you have advantage on sorcerer spell attacks.

name: Warlock
summary: Power on loan from something vast — read the fine print.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.summary: Learn one invocation — a fragment of forbidden power (more at higher levels).

features.name: Pact Magic
features.summary: Cast spells from the warlock list using Charisma; few slots, always at your highest level, regained on short rest.

name: Wizard
summary: Magic as a discipline: studied, notated, and unleashed on schedule.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.summary: Cast prepared spells from your spellbook using Intelligence; the book holds six 1st-level spells to start.

features.name: Ritual Adept
features.summary: Cast rituals directly from your spellbook without preparing them.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.summary: Once per day after a short rest, recover spell slots totaling half your wizard level (rounded up).
